title: rhus aromatica var. pilosissima
intro: Rhus aromatica var. pilosissima, also known as smooth sumac, is a deciduous shrub native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of smooth sumac include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting digestion, as well as potentially lowering cholesterol and blood pressure. Smooth sumac can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
